title: What Is Reamer?
description: Reamer is a local-first experimentation environment that turns a trading idea into validated strategy logic — and stops the moment that proof is complete.

title: Why Reamer Exists
description: The bottleneck in systematic trading isn't a shortage of ideas or capital — it's that most backtesting was never strict enough to tell a real edge from noise. Reamer exists to close that gap.

title: Research, Not Deployment
description: Reamer produces validated strategy logic and stops there. It does not place trades, connect to a broker, or run anything live — not as a missing feature, but as a permanent, intentional edge of the product.
